title: RIO Execution Token — Token Issuance + Preflight Gate + Kernel Executor
description: Extracted from controlPlane.ts (A5: ExecutionToken, executeGatePreflight), kernelExecutor.ts (kernelExecute, WAL discipline, tool sandbox, nonce consumption), and authorityLayer.ts (AuthorizationToken, gate checks).

ExecutionToken.description: controlPlane.ts — A5: EXECUTION TOKEN. Single-use, time-bound, hash-bound. Issued after successful approval or auto-approval.

intent_hash.description: SHA-256(canonical_json(envelope)). Binds token to specific intent.

action_hash.description: SHA-256(canonical_json({action_type, target, parameters})). Binds token to specific action+params.

policy_version.description: Policy version at time of approval.

ttl.description: Time-to-live in milliseconds. Kernel uses 5000ms (5 seconds).

used.description: Set to true after successful gate passage. Single-use enforcement.

AuthorizationToken.description: authorityLayer.ts — Authorization token issued by the authority layer. Separate from ExecutionToken. Binds to policy hash and has execution count limits.

GateCheck.description: controlPlane.ts executeGatePreflight(). Individual preflight check result.

check.description: The six preflight gate checks in order.

AuthorityGateCheck.description: authorityLayer.ts validateAuthorizationToken(). Gate checks for the authority-layer token.

GatePreflightResult.description: controlPlane.ts executeGatePreflight(). Aggregate result of all six gate checks.

passed.description: True only if ALL checks pass.

ToolSandboxCheck.description: kernelExecutor.ts enforceToolSandbox(). Validates tool name and target against denylist and allowlist.

KernelExecutionResult.description: kernelExecutor.ts kernelExecute(). The complete result of a kernel execution attempt.

stage_reached.description: The last stage successfully reached. Failure is reported at the stage that failed.

kernel_execution_order.description: kernelExecutor.ts kernelExecute(). Strict order: (0) Expression isolation guard → (1) Verify envelope → (2) Governance decision → (3) Human authorization check → (4) Tool sandbox enforcement → (5) WAL PREPARED → (6) Issue execution token (TTL ≤ 5sec) → (7) Execute via token-verified executor boundary → (8) WAL COMMITTED/FAILED → (9) Return receipt.

single_entry_point.description: kernelExecutor.ts. kernelExecute() is the ONLY function that may produce side effects. All production execution paths MUST call this function.

token_ttl.description: kernelExecutor.ts. KERNEL_TOKEN_TTL_MS = 5000 (5 seconds). Execution tokens expire after 5 seconds.

token_single_use.description: controlPlane.ts executeGatePreflight(). If gate passes, storedToken.used is set to true. Second use fails token_valid check.

nonce_consumption.description: kernelExecutor.ts consumeNonce(). After gate passes, nonce is consumed via DB-backed atomic operation. Replay of same nonce returns NONCE_REPLAY error.

gate_all_must_pass.description: controlPlane.ts executeGatePreflight(). passed = checks.every(c => c.status === 'PASS'). ALL six checks must pass.

tool_sandbox.description: kernelExecutor.ts enforceToolSandbox(). TOOL_DENYLIST blocks: /runtime/*, /config/*, /keys/*, localhost, recursive RIO calls. TOOL_ALLOWLIST enforces per-tool URL restrictions.

expression_isolation_at_kernel_entry.description: kernelExecutor.ts. Step 0: isExpressionOutput(params.envelope) → EXPRESSION_ISOLATION_VIOLATION. ExpressionOutput CANNOT enter the kernel.

action_hash_binding.description: controlPlane.ts. action_hash = SHA-256(canonical_json({action_type, target, parameters})). Any change to parameters after approval causes action_hash_match to FAIL.

failure_conditions.expression_at_kernel_entry: ExpressionOutput passed to kernelExecute() → EXPRESSION_ISOLATION_VIOLATION. Stage: VERIFICATION.
failure_conditions.verification_failure: Any of 6 verification checks fail → stage: VERIFICATION.
failure_conditions.governance_deny: Governance decision is DENY → stage: GOVERNANCE.
failure_conditions.missing_approval: REQUIRE_HUMAN_APPROVAL but no approval provided → 'Silence equals refusal.' Stage: HUMAN_AUTHORIZATION.
failure_conditions.sandbox_violation: Tool name or target matches denylist → stage: SANDBOX.
failure_conditions.wal_prepared_failure: WAL PREPARED write fails → execution blocked. Stage: WAL_PREPARED.
failure_conditions.token_expired: now >= token.expires_at → token_not_expired FAIL. Stage: EXECUTION_GATE.
failure_conditions.token_already_used: storedToken.used === true → token_valid FAIL. Stage: EXECUTION_GATE.
failure_conditions.intent_hash_mismatch: token.intent_hash !== governance.intent_hash → intent_hash_match FAIL. Stage: EXECUTION_GATE.
failure_conditions.action_hash_mismatch: Parameters changed after approval → action_hash_match FAIL. Stage: EXECUTION_GATE.
failure_conditions.policy_version_changed: token.policy_version !== governance.policy_version → policy_version_match FAIL. Stage: EXECUTION_GATE.
failure_conditions.nonce_replay: Nonce already consumed → NONCE_REPLAY. Stage: EXECUTION_GATE.
failure_conditions.connector_failure: Connector throws or returns success:false → stage: EXECUTION.
failure_conditions.wal_committed_failure: Execution succeeded but WAL COMMITTED write fails → caller MUST NOT return success. Stage: WAL_COMMITTED.
